title: Lake Naivasha Budget Lodge
description: Weekend lakeside bandas with hippo lawns and boat hires — Rift escape without resort prices.
highlights:
Lake view bandas
Hippo spotting
Boat hire
Weekend deals
directions: Matatu to Naivasha, lodge pick-up or boda from town.
safety_and_conditions: Hippos on lodge lawns at night — keep distance.
travel_tips: Book weekday for 20% lower rates at many bandas.

title: Kijabe Forest Cottages
description: Cool escarpment cottages in pine forest — fireplace vibes an hour from Nairobi.
highlights:
Forest cottages
Cool climate
Hiking trails
Weekend reset
directions: Matatu on Nairobi–Naivasha highway drop Kijabe.
safety_and_conditions: Cold nights — lodge provides blankets but pack warm socks.
travel_tips: Self-catering units save on food costs.

title: Lukenya Getaway Cottages
description: Granite-view cottages near Lukenya hills — budget groups and climbers welcome.
highlights:
Group cottages
Climbing access
Near Nairobi
BBQ pits
directions: Matatu Kitengela/Athi River, short boda to cottages.
travel_tips: Split cottage among 6–8 for best value.

title: Elementaita Homestay
description: Community homestays on the flamingo lake shore — home cooking and stargazing.
highlights:
Homestay meals
Flamingo lake
Community tourism
Quiet nights
directions: Matatu to Gilgil/Naivasha, boda to homestay.
safety_and_conditions: Wildlife near shore — hosts guide night walks.
what_to_carry: Torch, warm layer, cash tip for cook.

title: Nanyuki Farm Stay
description: Budget farm stays on the Laikipia foothills with Mount Kenya views and campfire nights.
highlights:
Farm stay
Mount Kenya views
Campfire
Market town access
directions: Bus/matatu to Nanyuki, farm pick-up from market.
what_to_carry: Warm layer, cash for market snacks.

title: Karen Budget B&B
description: Leafy Karen guesthouses with garden breakfast — city staycation without CBD prices.
highlights:
Garden B&B
Near Karura
City quiet
Uber access
directions: Matatu or ride-hail to Karen Road guesthouses.
safety_and_conditions: Standard city safety — use registered taxis at night.
travel_tips: Book mid-week for Nairobi staycation deals.

title: Kisumu Lakeside Guesthouse
description: Lake Victoria sunset guesthouses — cheap beds and fish markets in western Kenya.
highlights:
Lake sunset
Fish markets
City walks
Budget rooms
directions: Bus to Kisumu, tuk-tuk to lakefront guesthouses.

title: Ngong Hills Eco-Camp
description: Tented eco-camp below Ngong Hills — sunrise ridge walks and city views.
highlights:
Eco tents
Ridge sunrise
City views
Weekend camp
directions: Matatu to Ngong, camp shuttle or boda.

title: Mount Kenya Bandas Weekend
description: KWS bandas on the mountain foothills — cool air and forest walks without summiting.
highlights:
Mountain bandas
Forest walks
Cool climate
Budget KWS
map_query: Mount Kenya bandas Naro Moru Kenya
directions: Bus to Nyeri/Naro Moru, taxi to gate bandas.

title: Tigoni Tea Country Cottage
description: Self-catering cottage in Tigoni tea country — fog, tea walks, and peri-urban quiet.
highlights:
Tea country
Self-catering
Cool fog
Peri-urban escape
directions: Matatu to Tigoni/Limuru, short boda to cottage.
